plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Mobile Mechanic Software to share your live location with dispatch during work hours, even when the app is in the background.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Mobile Mechanic Software to access your location while you use the app so you can start workday tracking.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Mobile Mechanic Software to use the microphone so mechanics can dictate field notes and job updates.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Mobile Mechanic Software to transcribe mechanic dictation into field notes and billing updates.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Mobile Mechanic Software to access your location while you use the app so you can start workday tracking.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Allow Mobile Mechanic Software to share your live location with dispatch during work hours, even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow Mobile Mechanic Software to transcribe mechanic dictation into field notes and billing updates.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Mobile Mechanic Software to use the microphone so mechanics can dictate field notes and job updates.
